title: JoWY's Mud Set
description: Adds a new set using mud bricks, and an easier way of obtaining mud.
body:
A new set made with mud bricks, to have more variated textures while using only dirt, and another way to obtain mud blocks easier.

# Why mud?
I don't know, I like the texture and color palette from the mud bricks, is cheap because it is made of just dirt, wheat and water.

In my case, I built an entire city and castle using ONLY mud bricks in survival, it wasn't difficult and it was pretty cool, but very annoying using a mud farm to obtain all that amount of blocks, and I would like more variety of textures while still using the same material.

# How can I obtain the new blocks?
You can use the stone cutter to obtain the new blocks, and using the stone cutter again or the crafting table to craft doors, trapdoors, stairs, slabs, fences and fence gates, and the sapling.

# Is there any way to obtain mud easier and faster without any farms?
****YES!**** right click when having a water bucket in off-hand and dirt in main-hand. Does not consume the water from the bucket, to make it easier to get mud from dirt when you can't (or don't want to) go to a mangrove swamp.

# I cannot break mud planks/logs with the axe!
All blocks from this mod are (obviously) made of ****mud bricks****, thy are ****NOT**** wood or real leaves, so you can't craft sticks or wooden related items, even if it looks like planks or logs, still need a pickaxe to obtain the blocks, leaves doesn't despawn if you break the log, mud sapling doesn't grow (should it grow?).

This has been made with MCreator. I'm not proud about this, but until I learn how to program in Java for Minecraft, I have to use this.
